name: Miglior Canned Cat Food - Rabbit Chunks, 405g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Support your cat’s wellness with Miglior Cat Food Rabbit Chunks, a vitamin-packed recipe formulated to promote strong bones, vibrant skin, and smooth, glossy fur.
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30% (rabbit 5%), cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 8.5%, Crude fat 4.8%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
